name: eLearning Review
description: Evaluates the technical quality, usability, and digital infrastructure of the OER for online and blended learning environments.
preamble: eLearning review evaluates the resource not just as content but as a digital artifact that must function reliably across platforms, devices, and institutional infrastructures. Reviewers consider the experience of a student accessing the resource on a mobile phone, through a screen reader, or via a slow internet connection in a rural area.

criteria.title: Usability and Technical Functionality
criteria.standard: All features function correctly. Navigation is intuitive and consistent. No broken links or missing assets.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Broken links, missing media, or non-functional interactive elements found.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Exceptional usability with clear wayfinding, consistent interaction patterns, and zero technical errors.

criteria.title: Technical Support and Documentation
criteria.standard: Technical requirements and setup instructions are documented for both instructors and students.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: No documentation of technical requirements or how to troubleshoot common issues.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Comprehensive instructor and student guides; troubleshooting FAQ included.

criteria.title: Mobile Accessibility and Cross-Platform Compatibility
criteria.standard: Resource functions correctly on major mobile platforms and browsers without loss of content or functionality.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Resource is desktop-only or breaks on mobile devices.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Responsive design optimized for mobile-first. Tested across iOS, Android, and desktop environments.

criteria.title: LMS Integration and Interoperability
criteria.standard: Resource can be integrated into common LMS platforms (Canvas, Blackboard, Moodle) via standard protocols (LTI, SCORM).
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: No LMS integration pathway documented. Proprietary format not interoperable.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Multiple integration pathways documented and tested. IMS Global compliance verified.

criteria.title: Data Privacy, Security, and Ownership
criteria.standard: Resource does not collect student data beyond what is disclosed. Privacy policy is accessible. FERPA compliance addressed.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Student data collection is undisclosed or undocumented. No privacy policy.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Privacy practices are exemplary and explicitly documented. Students retain ownership of their data.

criteria.title: Cost, Sustainability, and Resource Requirements
criteria.standard: Resource is free to access and use. No hidden costs. Dependencies on paid services are disclosed.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Resource requires paid subscriptions or software not disclosed to students.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Fully free and open-source. Sustainable without institutional subscriptions. Offline version available.

criteria.title: Accessibility Integration
criteria.standard: eLearning features meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards. Accessibility documentation is provided.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Interactive features are inaccessible to keyboard or screen reader users.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Full WCAG 2.1 AAA compliance for all interactive features. VPAT documentation available.

criteria.title: Pedagogical Effectiveness and Learning Enhancement
criteria.standard: Digital features enhance learning beyond what print would provide. Interactions are purposeful, not decorative.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Digital features add no pedagogical value beyond a static document.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Digital affordances are used innovatively to enable learning experiences impossible in print.

criteria.title: Learning Analytics and Customization
criteria.standard: Instructors can customize the resource for their course context. Basic analytics are available where appropriate.
criteria.needsImprovementPrompt: Resource is a closed, uncustomizable package. No instructor controls.
criteria.exceedsPrompt: Full customization with instructor dashboard, learner progress tracking, and ethical analytics.
